HomePage.heroDescription: Ex-Groupon, I automated operations for 400+ people across 3 continents. Now I do the same for you.

HomePage.service2Desc: n8n workflows, Google Apps Script, Jira Automation. Eliminate manual tasks and connect your tools to save hours every week.

HomePage.service4Desc: Ongoing support to maintain, optimize, and extend your automations. Proactive monitoring, fixes, and new features every month.
HomePage.newsletterDescription: One email per week with the best resources, tools, and insights on automation and AI.

ContactForm.successMessage: Thank you for your message. I'll get back to you within 24h.

Projects.hyprDesc: AI-powered performance review system for 150+ employees. Automatic generation of structured feedback and objective scoring.
Projects.hyprProblem: Manual performance reviews took 3 weeks per cycle and suffered from significant subjective biases, reducing employee trust.
Projects.hyprResult2: Review time reduced from 3 weeks to 3 days
Projects.hyprResult3: Manager satisfaction score went from 62% to 91%
Projects.bigpictureDesc: Cross-platform initiative tracking synchronizing Jira, Confluence, and Google Sheets for real-time project progress visibility.
Projects.bigpictureProblem: Teams used 3 different tools with no consolidated view. Weekly status updates required 4 hours of manual work per PM.
Projects.caplabourDesc: Capacity planning tool (v1 + v2) enabling managers to forecast workload and optimize resource allocation.
Projects.caplabourProblem: Capacity planning was done in Excel with outdated data. Over-allocations were detected too late, causing project delays.
Projects.kindlyDesc: Compliance bot with automated monitoring. Smart reminders and real-time corrective action tracking.
Projects.kindlyProblem: Teams regularly forgot to complete compliance actions, leading to audit risks and time-consuming manual follow-ups.
Projects.n8nDesc: 18 enterprise automation workflows covering onboarding, reporting, alerting, and cross-system data synchronization.
Projects.n8nProblem: Dozens of repetitive manual processes between Slack, Jira, Google Workspace, and internal tools, generating errors and wasted time.
Projects.jiraDesc: 18 Jira Cloud rules automating ticket management: assignment, transitions, notifications, and SLA tracking.
Projects.jiraProblem: Manual Jira ticket management created status inconsistencies, forgotten assignments, and approximate SLA tracking.
Projects.catalogueDesc: Centralized registry of all organization automations with documentation, ownership, and performance metrics.
Projects.catalogueProblem: With 40+ automations in production, nobody knew exactly what existed, who was responsible, or if it was working correctly.

Posts.post4Summary: From theory to production: chunking, embeddings, vector store, and orchestration. The technical choices that truly matter.
